payload.answer: I can preserve the preference only in ambiguous form; no specific durable memory was committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The object of preference is ambiguous; there is not enough context to resolve which option "the other one" refers to.

memory_cards.statement: He prefers the other one, but the referent of "the other one" is unspecified.

details: Preserved ambiguity in the stored statement.
Avoided committing an unresolved referent as a specific fact.

repair_options: Provide the specific item or option he prefers.
If this is a replacement for an earlier memory, identify the prior memory to rewrite.
